blocks.text: Education Outside the Classroom New Zealand's stunning landscapes offer endless opportunities for personal growth, connection with others, and self-discovery. At Rosehill College, we embrace the transformative power of nature through our comprehensive Education Outside the Classroom (EOTC) programme. With a proud tradition of outdoor education, we are fortunate to have ongoing access to the Waharau Outdoor Education Centre, nestled in the breathtaking Hunua Ranges. This exceptional facility serves as a base for various outdoor experiences that enrich our students' lives. Each year, our Year 10 students embark on an unforgettable camp experience, led by our enthusiastic Year 12 leaders. Many students highlight these camps as some of their most cherished memories at Rosehill College, where friendships are forged, challenges are embraced, and lifelong skills are developed. But the adventure does not stop there! We offer a wide range of EOTC experiences tailored to accommodate students of all skill levels and confidence. Whether it is hiking, kayaking, rock climbing, or team-building activities, our programmes are designed to engage, inspire, and empower every student. Puni tau tekau/Year 10 Camp 2026 Year 10 Camp The Year 10 Camp dates for each House are as follows: Atawhai & Rangatahi: 16 – 18 March Pounamu & Taikura: 23 - 25 March Kahurangi & Manutaki: 25 - 27 March Below are the Year 10 Camp forms, each student will need to have completed: (House) Parental Consent EOTC Health Profile Form For your information there are also the following:  Year 10 Camp Letter  Gear List  Atawhai Parental Consent  Kahurangi Parental Consent  Manutaki Parental Consent  Pounamu Parental Consent  Rangatahi Parental Consent  Taikura Parental Consent  EOTC Health Profile Camp Payments Camp payments can be made via bank transfer using the details below: Bank: ASB BankAccount Name: Rosehill College BoardAccount Number: 12-3031-0837472-00 Particulars: Student ID numberCode: Student’s surnameReference: Y10 Camp Please ensure all payment details are entered correctly so that the payment can be allocated to the correct student.

New Zealand's stunning landscapes offer endless opportunities for personal growth, connection with others, and self-discovery. At Rosehill College, we embrace the transformative power of nature through our comprehensive Education Outside the Classroom (EOTC) programme.

With a proud tradition of outdoor education, we are fortunate to have ongoing access to the Waharau Outdoor Education Centre, nestled in the breathtaking Hunua Ranges. This exceptional facility serves as a base for various outdoor experiences that enrich our students' lives.

Each year, our Year 10 students embark on an unforgettable camp experience, led by our enthusiastic Year 12 leaders. Many students highlight these camps as some of their most cherished memories at Rosehill College, where friendships are forged, challenges are embraced, and lifelong skills are developed.

But the adventure does not stop there! We offer a wide range of EOTC experiences tailored to accommodate students of all skill levels and confidence. Whether it is hiking, kayaking, rock climbing, or team-building activities, our programmes are designed to engage, inspire, and empower every student.
